name_en: 💖With full original red box packaging💖【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium shoulder bag features a D-ring for hanging removable items, adding practical functionality.
name_cn:
💖With full original red box packaging💖【New】The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This medium shoulder bag features a D-ring for hanging removable items, adding practical functionality.
Beige and white new GG monogram coated canvas
Beige leather trim with contrasting stitching
Red and green webbing cotton lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Strap: Height 11.5 - 22.5cm; Length 72cm
Zipper closure
Weight: approx. 450g
Model: 815216.
Dimensions: 31.5cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Beige/Original leather.
Made in Italy
